chapter_title.en: Chapter 21 – The Penalty (Hadd) regarding the sodomy

text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) رَجُلٌ أَتَى رَجُلًا قَالَ إِنْ كَانَ مُحْصَناً فَعَلَيْهِ الْقَتْلُ وَ إِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ مُحْصَناً فَعَلَيْهِ الْجَلْدُ قَالَ فَقُلْتُ فَمَا عَلَى الْمُوطَإِ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ الْقَتْلُ عَلَى كُلِّ حَالٍ مُحْصَناً كَانَ أَوْ غَيْرَ مُحْصَنٍ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moala Bin Muhammad, from Al hassan Bin Ali, from Hammad Bin Usman who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘A man comes to a man’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘If he was married, so upon him is the killing, and if does not happen to be married, so upon him is the whipping’. So I said, ‘So what is upon the passive one?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Upon him is the killing upon every state, whether he was married, or without marriage’.
